evals.prompt: I'm building a SaaS project management tool like a simplified Jira. It's just me and one other dev. We want to ship an MVP in 3 months. How should we architect this?
evals.expected_output: Constraint-driven recommendation favoring simplicity (modular monolith), layer structure, tech stack guidance

evals.prompt: We have a Django monolith handling our e-commerce platform. It's getting slow under load (~500 req/s) and the team has grown to 12 devs stepping on each other. Should we move to microservices?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of whether microservices actually solve the problems, alternative approaches (caching, read replicas, modular monolith), migration strategy if warranted

evals.prompt: I need to add real-time notifications to our app. Users should see updates when someone comments on their task, assigns them something, etc. Currently we have a REST API backend and React frontend. What's the right architecture for this?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of approaches (WebSockets, SSE, polling), integration with existing REST architecture, backend event propagation pattern
